notes: Headquartered in Islandia NY; later rebranded CA Technologies; acquired by Broadcom Inc. for $18.9B in 2018; Islandia campus demolished 2024
Boston-based IT analyst firm; acquired by Harte-Hanks in 2001; brand later acquired by Spire Research
Non-quota-carrying customer service unit created as part of CA's reform program; CRO stood for Client Relations Organization
